title: rubus alpestris
intro: Rubus alpestris, also known as Alpine Raspberry or Mountain Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, containing anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Rubus alpestris include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and aid in the management of certain types of cancer. Rubus alpestris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for digestive issues and to promote wound healing.
